prestazioni: M177 DE40 AL 4.0L V8 Biturbo (476 HP stock) – Full Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ Hybrid Turbo Upgrade (Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, 106mm turbine wheels, and 1.22 A/R housings) paired with Weistec’s CNC-ported AMG cylinder heads, upgraded titanium valves, and custom camshafts (292° intake / 288° exhaust duration, 12.5mm lift) for 850 HP on 93 octane with a 7,500 RPM redline

AMG GT 63 Pro-specific PWR Australia intercooler kit (dual-core 4.5L capacity, 100% aluminum construction with 3.5" charge pipes and silicone couplers) and Weistec’s upgraded fuel system (dual Bosch Motorsport 450 LPH pumps, 1000cc ID1000 injectors, and a Radium Engineering port injection kit for E85 compatibility up to 60%)

KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (24-way rebound, 12-way compression, and adjustable top mounts) with custom valving for the AMG GT 63 Pro’s 50:50 weight distribution, paired with H&R Monoball front subframe bushings and a full Whiteline rear subframe lockout kit to eliminate torque steer under 800+ HP launches
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders with 50mm wider front and 70mm wider rear tracks, paired with custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser extensions for the GT 63 Pro’s active aero system)

Vorsteiner GTS II carbon fiber front splitter (with integrated canards and a 3-stage adjustable gurney flap) and a custom 3M 1080 Matte Graphite Wrap with exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood, mirrors, and rear wing (AMG GT 63 Pro-specific wing reinforcement plates for 200+ MPH stability)

OEM+ AMG Night Package II (blacked-out grille, side mirrors, and rear diffuser) combined with a custom Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system (4.5" quad outlets, electronically controlled valves, and a 30% weight reduction over stock) with carbon fiber tips and a secondary sound actuator delete for raw M177 V8 acoustics
